patches.description: Make header.js defensive when the nav-tools section is missing (DA.live strips empty divs), preventing a null-reference crash. Universal — affects any DA.live-using EDS storefront.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce; delete on merge. Universal — same PR as the citisignal entry's exit retires both.

patches.description: Fix the account-sidebar selector race that renders an empty left nav on freshly-published storefronts by also matching the authored structure (main > div > ol > li). Universal — affects any commerce storefront.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce (cf. fork PR #2); delete on merge. Universal — same PR as the citisignal entry's exit retires both.
